entry.title: Re: Regarding the Schedule End Time in Schedule Delivery...
entry.content: Thank you for your reply. I understand your response. I would like to schedule on fixed days of the week after defining the start and end times. With the method you taught me, I think I need to explicitly specify the dates, but would it be possible to repeat these settings on fixed days of the week? Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Change a dataset in a SAC story and to keep the story...
entry.content: Sure, here you go

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI for Java 8.10 on the Horizon
entry.content:
Hi @RMW 

 

Thanks for your sharing, it really help us a lot.

" In case the note can not be applied short term, the ABAP workbench can be switched to use the TextEdit control instead. To activate the fallback, in transactions like se80, se38 etc. choose the menu "Utilities" > "Settings". On tab "ABAP Editor", inner-tab "Editor", activate the "Text-based editor" radiobutton and restart the transaction to take effect. "

 

🙂

Regards,

ZFiori.

entry.title: Re: SAP EWM Check Monitor Framework - How to correct Document Flow Issues
entry.content:
Dir Sir/Madam,

I happened to encounter a PCA missing issue. When I follow the video to correct the PCA links, I found that in my EWM check monitor, under the node Outbound Delivery Process —>Document Flow, it doesn't have the function ' check document flow'. Do you have any suggestion? The S4Core Version is 106 and we used S4/HANA 2021

Thanks!

entry.title: How to due with the red alert for the ARIBA CIG addon in EWA report
entry.content:
Hi SAP;

We are having a very critical alarm in EWA of our S4 system, this is because the component ARBCI1 is in the SP 20 and the new one is 22, but we also have the ARBCIGR installed and our s/4 hana version is 2023.

Our questions:

  • if we need the ARBCI1 and the ARBCI2 to keep in the system? or can we deinstall the component? and leave only the ARBCIGR ?
  • Please let us know what can be done, that way we can raise the correct service request.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to due with the red alert for the ARIBA CIG addon...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

According to the CIG Support Pack - Support Policy documented in the following note.
CIG Addon for S4 HANA has 3 components ARBCI1, ARBCI2 & ARBCIGR, and each of the software components should be considered separately and update the latest or the second latest SP level.

2400737 - Ariba Cloud Integration Solutions for SAP: Supported SAP Product Versions 

CIG Support Pack - Support Policy:

To adhere with the standard SAP support model, SAP Ariba will only support the current (version N) and the version preceding the current version (version N-1) for the SAP Ariba Cloud Integration Gateway. CIG has 3 components ARBCI1, ARBCI2 & ARBCIGR and each of these components could be at different SP level. Current version is determined from the component with highest Support Pack level. 

 For example, with the support package SP 0008 release, ARBCI1 is SP008 while ARBCI2 is SP006 and ARBCIGR is SP0001 and SAP Ariba supports the following versions:

·         Current released version (version n) – for example, ARBCI1: SP 0008

·         Preceding released version (version n-1)– for example, ARBCI1: SP 0007

 SAP Ariba recommends that customers must always upgrade to the latest SP release that is available at GA (General Availability) / RTC (Released To customer). The new releases always include additional enhancements and new features and customers can benefits from these functionalities.


Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: We want mirrored environments for testing
entry.content:
We want mirrored environments for testing 

See Basic information please.

  • It is a general question about getting information about setting up a test system backup or parallel/mirrored test environments, active/active and active/passive configuration, specifically with SAP HANA. 
    1. What is the SAP best practice or recommended approach for setting up mirrored/ parallel environments for test systems? What replication approach or mode and what configuration would be used in our case to ensure test cycles are not disrupted when a test system is being refreshed?
    2. What are the recommended OSS Notes for setting up mirrored test environment, replication and management for SAP S/4 HANA and SAP HANA?
    3. Is catch up synchronization possible? If we want to restore the master, config, transactional test data that was lost during the testing done while primary is being refreshed (5-6 weeks of downtime)

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: We want mirrored environments for testing
entry.content:
Dear customer,

Regarding to your concern, I'm giving you the relevant information below.
It's based on HANA 2.0 SPS07.

  • KBA 1999880 - FAQ: SAP HANA System Replication (67. What is database replication in the context of tenant copy / move?)
  • Relevant documents
    • Copy or Clone an SAP HANA System    
      Copying and Moving Tenant Databases  
      Copying a System Using System Replication  
      Copying a Database Using Backup and Recovery 

  • Active/Active (Read Enabled)

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Regarding the Schedule End Time in Schedule Delivery...
entry.content: Let me modify my comment. Even if it's not on fixed days of the week, I want to keep running indefinitely based on the working day calendar without an end date/time, without terminating after a single execution.

entry.title: Uncheking Batch Management
entry.content:
Hello master,

I created wrong batch for material, and I want to delete it completely from the system. But when I uncheking the batch management and batch management(Plant) its saying error as bacth already exist.

I've tried using MSC2N, MM74 but it hasn't worked yet, If any one have faced this problem then can you please guide me.

Thank you

Bryan

entry.title: STMS QA worklist approve TR BAPI or RFC
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I need help with a task involving SAP TR (Transport Request) approval. I'm working with an external workflow system where I need to:
1. Sign/approve the SAP TR in the external workflow system
2. Update the SAP TR status to "approved" in SAP after approval in the external workflow system

I'm looking for the appropriate BAPI or RFC to accomplish this, but haven't found any suitable options. Could anyone provide some suggestions or point me in the right direction?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: How to assign Users as Approver and Requester in SAP...
entry.content:
Hi @Dan_Wroblewski,

I created one user for one global account and one subaccount.

So, I have now 2 users, 2 global accounts and 2 subaccounts.

Because in our approval system, there can be many approvers and each approver wants to login to the system with their own email.

So, I think, each approver user has each own inbox separately.

And I am not sure that this requirement can be done by using only one BTP account.

Can we let the approver users login and use Inbox of SAP Build by using their own emails if we created many subaccount in only one BTP account?

If we can, how can I proceed to get like this. I mean that creating many subaccounts by using many emails in just one BTP account?

Could you please provide the information about it?

Thank you.

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Developer Onboarding | Custom Domains
entry.content: The videos are marked as private. Can they be made public so we can get access to view them?

entry.title: Re: An authorization token of destination ads-rest-api ha...
entry.content: Terry, The reason is I get the token and store it as class level variant. Then in class method api call I put the token in API call header . This method is not correct . In every API call , need to reget the Token first,then call API. Then the issue disappeare .

entry.title: GTS Legal Control: Licence active status
entry.content:
We are using GTS to checks sales orders and STO's have a valid regulatory licence.

Need to create a new licence status to enable a licence to be controlled by specific dates.  This will be active.

Issue is that GTS will not allow multiple status with active settings in the determination.  

Current status:

0001 License Created
0002 License Submitted to Authorities
0003 License Rejected by Authorities
0004 License Active
0005 License Submitted-Extension/Renewal
0006 License Expired

What to add new status:

0007 License Active-Validity Period Concession

Both 0004 and 0007 should be set as active.  A licence will only have 1 or other (we are not trying to set both).

Both have setting "D Application accepted - Licence is active". 

Note: I have tried all the other options and none work.

Behaviour - If 0004 is the first in the sequence (/SAPSLL/V_T606SV), the sales order will pass when 0004 is selected on licence but blocks when 0007 is activated on the licence, even though setting is D - licence is active.   Need it to recognise if either 0004 or 0007 is selected, the licence is active.

On the blocked documents (GTS), Selection criteria for import/export license shows status 0004.  Even when the licence is set to 0007.

If I switch the sequence (/SAPSLL/V_T606SV) to 0007 being the first sequence the selection criteria for import/export license now shows status 0007 and sales order passes.  When the licence is then updated to 0004 active, the sales order will block as it's looking for 0007.  Again, need it to recognise either 0004 or 0007 as active.

It appears to be finding the first status with D - licence is active and blocking any other status later in sequence.

Other Config settings -

/SAPSLL/V_T606DR: LELDT Determination of Legal Regulation for Legal Control

Determination Rule = Determination using first strategy.   

I have also tried A determination using all strategies. This did not fix.

Determination strategy (/sapsll/cd_maintain):

Can see status as a column heading in CD02 and CD05 but can't change anything here.

 

Appreciate any help in how to enable a second active status on a licence.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Why don't To-Do items appear on Learning page?
entry.content:
New to SAP, implementing Learning. I was trying to work out where any notifications/reminders to complete surveys might be hiding in the New Learning Experience. They do not appear on the new Learning home page.

I noticed they do appear in the To-Do on every other page in SF but not learning, when you click on the To Do button you get the message below.

 

Can anyone offer a solution? Please do not tell me this is expected behaviour. There must be a solution in Learning. I am very very underwhelmed with this LMS product.

entry.title: Wily Introscopeについての問い合わせ
entry.content:
ご担当者様

お世話になっております。

Wily Introscopeについて、詳細及び実際のインストール手順をご教示ください。
またインストールした際にデメリット（負荷が上がる）などもあれば併せてご教示ください。

以上となります。よろしくお願いいたします。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Wily Introscopeについての問い合わせ
entry.content:
ご管理者様

平素よりお世話になっております。

Introscopeのインストールについて、SAPノート2557578をご参照ください。
インストールに必要なスペースに対して、お手数ですが、
対象Introscopeのインストールガイド「3 Installing the CA APM」をご確認ください。
Introscope10.7及び10.8のインストールガイドについて、下記リリースノートをご参照ください。

2557578 - How to install/uninstall Introscope Enterprise Manager 10.x - Windows/Unix
2909673 - Introscope 10.7 Release Notes        
3247270 - Introscope 10.8 Release Notes

CA/BroadcomおよびSAPが契約を締結いたしました、
CA APM IntroscopeをSAP Solution Managerの一部として、
SAPが開発されたダッシュボードや計装と併せてご使用いただけるようになりました。
この特定のIntroscopeバージョンは、Right-To-View（RTV）バージョンのIntroscopeと申し上げております。

CA APM IntroscopeのRight to View（RTV）バージョンは、
完全な製品の制限された読み取り専用形式であり、SAP Solution Managerに同梱されております。
RTVバージョンにおけるサポートは、SAPによってライセンス供与およびサポートされている製品に限定されております。
SAPが提供するRTVバージョンのCA APM Introscopeに含まれる計装、ダッシュボード、Probe Builder Directives（PBDs）、
管理モジュール、およびSmartstorデータは、SAP様の知的財産でございます。

これらの機能の使用はSAP様によって制限されておりますが、
SAP Extended Diagnostics by CA, foundation from SAP（SAPノート1280961: SAP Extended Diagnostics by CA Wily）をライセンスいただくことで、制限なしにご使用いただけます。

以上、よろしくお願いします。
Haterm
SAPサポート

entry.title: Translation of SBN Company Profile
entry.content:
Hello, experts!
I have a question regarding the translation of company profile information.

Our client (SBN Buyer Account) is a Japanese company.
To do business mainly with Japanese suppliers, I have set up the company profile in Japanese, including company name and address.
I have also set up the company profile in English (Latin characters) as requested by the SBN system.

Our customers (SBN Buyer Accounts) sometimes do business with suppliers overseas.
So, it would be good if the overseas suppliers can check the company profile information in English (Latin characters).
How can this be achieved?
We logged into our test-overseas-supplier account with the browser language set to English, but the order details screen displayed the profile in Japanese.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Adopting General Display Name
entry.content:
Hi @Carlo1_1990 ,

Correct, after enabling GDN, DISPLAYNAME is in template and can't be configured like assignment UUID, but it is mandatory when import

Thanks

Harvey

entry.title: Re: SAP Bill Of Material purpose
entry.content:
Hi Community,

" A Bill of Materials (BOM) in SAP is like a recipe for making a product. It tells you what components (ingredients) are needed and in what quantities to create the final product (finished good). "

 

Thanks for your selfless sharing, it really help us a lot.

 

🙂

 

Regards,

ZFiori.

entry.title: Re: Regarding the Schedule End Time in Schedule Delivery...
entry.content:
Hello @Karti

Based on your response, I suggest making some changes to the previous settings when defining the recurrence pattern, as shown in the screenshot below

Please test and let me know

Best Regards

Vivek Savant

entry.title: Ui5 init command not working
entry.content:
Hello,

When I run ui5 init on BAS then it showing ui5 not found. How to resolve it.

entry.title: Re: Contabilizar valor líquido
entry.content:
Aqui parece que deu certo com um item que não é de estoque, NF com ICMS e IPI, mas precisei lançar o valor total da nota fiscal já com IPI na linha e criar uma nova fórmula de imposto ajustando a base de cálculo do IPI.

Na utilização em “Adicionar imposto no custo do item” = SIM;

 

Nos atributos opção "Incluído no preço" e informar a contrapartida para o valor do imposto; 

 

Adicionei uma nova fórmula para o IPI, onde a base é o valor informado na linha (já com IPI) dividido por (1+ (alíquota do IPI)); 

 

Para ICMS utilizei a fórmula comum, sem IPI na BC, porque o IPI já estará incluso no valor lançado na linha; 

 

Adicionei a combinação de impostos com a nova fórmula; 

 

No código de imposto inseri a nova combinação de impostos; 

 

Na NF de entrada informei o valor total da NF já com IPI na linha; 

 

Lançamento gerado; 

** ICMS está com a BC reduzida por isso não é 18% conforme consta no código do imposto

entry.title: Re: Ui5 init command not working
entry.content:
probably you have to install

@ui5/cli

entry.title: Manager Field Data Dictionary
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Good day! I am trying to build a customized LMS report via Plateau Report Designer and I need to pull a data for the Manager email address, First name, Last name however I cannot find in the Data dictionary what are the equivalent of the mentioned fields. 

I have refer to existing report and check the query however the query is too advance for me to understand. Would you know what are the fields name from data dictionary I can use? Thank you for the help.

 

Regards,

Wayne

entry.title: Re: Schedule publications SAC Stories in Excel file type
entry.content:
Hello @tuna_b,

You need to check if the connection setting for BW live connection has been done correctly, can you try to schedule to pdf format and check if it works for same story.

Yes, we will plan for unzip excel deliver over email

Thanks,
Pranav

entry.title: Difference between Readiness Check and Sizing values
entry.content:
Hello!

A customer is going to migrate from:
ECC 6.0 to RISE S/4HANA Private Edition

We are evaluating how much additional memory we have to add to the target architecture.
The Sizing report indicates (Gib):
- Memory requirement 1,604.0
- Net data size on disk 1,490.2

The Readiness Check report indicates:
Anticipated Initial Memory Requirement for SAP HANA 524 (in GiB)

We have few questions about the Readiness Check and Sizing reports:

1) Which of the two data (Readiness Check or Sizing) do I take to calculate the memory required for the migration?

2) Where does it indicate in these reports the amount of memory required for the following SKUs:
FileSystem
File Storage
8008794 - Additional File Storage
8011367 - Additional Database Storage

3) Or how could I calculate FileSystem and FileStorage?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: SLD Data Supplier to to SAP's Support Backbone, for S...
entry.content: It seems the HANA 2.00.072 version doesn't support to use the proxy option. If proxy has to be used, please plan the HANA update >=2.00.077.00. Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: Availability of Combined Orders/Collective order Functions in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are tasked with providing a solution for the printing and packaging industry, where Advanced Variant Configuration is being implemented. One of the main components in production is the paper reel. To optimize the utilization of paper reels, maximize production capacity, and reduce costs, the company produces multiple customer orders within a single production cycle.
In this process, all the BOM components for the multiple orders are issued collectively, and the finished goods are also received in one consolidated attempt.
To address this requirement, we have identified that combined orders or collective orders may be viable options within the SAP system. However, we seek to understand the feasibility and implementation possibilities of these options in the SAP Public Cloud environment. Additionally, we would like to know if there are any alternative approaches available to achieve this requirement.

Best regards,
Kaushika Nanayakkara

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Manufacturing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: How can i close production order after techo ?
entry.content:
when I want to close the production order. "Why am I seeing the error 'Change Not Allowed. after technically complete. How can I resolve this error?

I have completed all processes like confirmation, settlement, and costing. But my status shows only techo.  not closed

entry.title: Re: Not able to change profit center from 102 to 101 in s...
entry.content:
Dear Sir,

The profit center can be directly picked from the material master ( MM02 ).

You can change the profit center in the material master.

However, if you want to directly change the profit center in the sales order, you can do so in the line item of the sales order.

entry.title: Re: how to display error message for choosing incorrect C...
entry.content: Hi Aditya, I have implemented the BADI 'USMD_CREQUEST_INTEGRATION' , can get the current CR type but not able to get the material type. So implemented the enhancement in feeder class CL_MDG_BS_MAT_FEEDER_FORM_MAT( IF_FPM_GUIBB_FORM~GET_DATA) of basic data CR section and can display the error message.

entry.title: Re: SAP Personas, store a sound as resource.
entry.content:
Of course.

Upload your sound file (for example in MP3 format) as a resource in Personas Administration, then refer to it via its GUID like this:

function playSound() { 
  var audio = new Audio( '/sap/bc/personas3/resource/A33EE416E8EE1EDFA9F88240268376BE'); 
  audio.play(); 
} 
playSound();

entry.title: SAP GUI for JAVA F4 search help, cannot use ALV format
entry.content:
SAP GUI for JAVA F4 search help, cannot use ALV format. When you are in the Help menu in the top menu bar, click Settings, F4 Help, and check the list on Show ALV. When field filtering is used in the report, the search help cannot be used when you click the search help corresponding to a field in the filtering box. The system dumps.

 

I don't know if you have encountered such a situation, how to solve it.It doesn't matter if the GUI version is 7.8 or 8.10. My computer runs MACOS.

entry.title: Re: Good to Know: SAP Travel Management for SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi Sheldon,

I've been reading through the notes and we're on S/4HANA 2022 now - but is this like HCM where you have a switch (H4S4) to move away from compatibility pack? It kind of looks like just being on S/4HANA 2022 means the only step is to maybe change your license over, but there is also talk of installing SAP Travel Management for SAP S/4HANA. Note - The youtube video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WrPY3AchiNU makes this really clear for HCM, but doesn't explain what to do for Travel except Upgrade to 2022 (minimum). As does the newer video https://www.youtube.com/live/mY95BJZS0J0 .

We are on-prem, but I also noticed in the first video, they say that Travel will not be allowed post 2025 in Private Edition, but it looks like that position has changed now but there is a new license for Private Edition?

Thanks,

Matt

entry.title: Re: Why don't To-Do items appear on Learning page?
entry.content:
Hello @GrantN,

Optional Surveys (Surveys which are required for item completion will show on the new home page. Only Course Feedback surveys impact item completion.) and Follow-Up Surveys are not visible on the New Learning Experience: New Home Page.

To access these surveys, users have to switch to legacy home page and then complete these surveys.

Optional survey is planned to come to ILX in 1H 2025 and therefore for now the recommendation is to keep the legacy HP as their default experience (so they don't need their users to switch). 

Note that survey email notifications would still be available, so that's another way users get alerted and completing such surveys.

entry.title: Updating Opportunity Screen in summary tab in SAP B1 using DI API - Document type, Document Number
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to update standard Fields of  summary tab in Opportunity Screen .but I was not able to recognize the field names in di api posting suggestion list for Document type, Document Number fields. 

Here is my DI API Code :

try
{
SAPbobsCOM.SalesOpportunities Opportunity = (SAPbobsCOM. SalesOpportunities)_company.GetBusinessObject(SAPbobsCOM.BoObjectTypes.oSalesOpportunities);
if (Opportunity.GetByKey(opportunityId)){
SAPbobsCOM.SalesOpportunitiesLines opportunitiesLines = Opportunity.Lines;

foreach (var stage in post){
if (stage.status = "WON"){
Opportunity. Status =BoSoOsStatus.sos_Sold;
}
if (stage.status = "LOST"){
Opportunity. Status =BoSoOsStatus.sos_Rissed;
Opportunity. Reasons. Reason= stage.decripId;
}
//Opportunity.Lines.DocumentType= SAPbobsCOM.BoAPARDocumentTypes.bodt Quotation;
//Opportunity.OriginType =SAPbobsCOM.BoObjectTypes oQuotations;
//opportunitiesLines. DocumentType =SAPbobsCOM.BoAPARDocumentTypes.bodt Quotation;
// Opportunity.LinkedDocument Number =;
Opportunity.Update();
}
int resultCode= Opportunity.Update();
if (resultCode != 0){
responseMessage = _company. GetLastErrorDescription();
}else{
responseMessage= ApplicationConstants.success_message;
}
}
I have tried using the provided suggestion for targeting the fields but it didn't update the values in Document type or Document Number
SAP Community SAP Cloud for Customer add-ins

entry.title: Inquiry About Default Sorting Order for accounts.search API
entry.content:
I hope this message finds you well.

I am currently working with the accounts.search API in SAP Customer Data Cloud, and I would like to inquire about the default sorting order of the results when the order by clause is not specified. Could you please clarify what the default order is, and whether it is consistent across different implementations?

entry.title: 新規インストール番号の生成について
entry.content:
SAP社との同じ契約だが、新規Installtion numberを発行するケースはありますでしょうか？


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: 新規インストール番号の生成について
entry.content:
インストレーション番号の契約または保守の更新に関するご質問があれば、

KBA1660069に従ってsapcontractcenter@sap.com に電子メールを送信して SAP Order Management (契約) に連絡してください。

また、

新規オンプレミスインストール番号の依頼方法:

1773826 - 新規オンプレミスインストール番号の依頼方法 - SAP for Me - SAP for Me

新規クラウドインストール番号の登録方法:
2757632 - クラウドインストールの追加、編集、または削除方法 - SAP for Me - SAP for Me

entry.title: Re: Actual Rate Calculation - Event Based Posting
entry.content:
Hello,

Since I can't see the complete configuration, I can only guess the cause.

1. The price unit in the result screen shows as blank. So please check the relevant setting.

2. The activity types and cost elements need to be assigned to relevant groups. You can check with app Mange Activity Types Groups, and Manage Cost Element Groups. Make sure the relevant activity types and accounts are maintained correctly.

3. Check in the log to find whether the warning message can be relevant.

Best Regards,
Owen

entry.title: Re: Outgoing Check and Payment
entry.content: Informed expert.

entry.title: Re: Enhanced Procurement Analytics with SAP Datasphere - KAUST POC Case Study
entry.content:
HI @lalitmohan,

Could you please provide detailed insights regarding the integration? I would like to know whether the Ariba data is stored within an HDI container, which is subsequently added to the SAP Datasphere space. and then these tables are consumed in DF/TF/Views in Datasphere?

Kalyan

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio Process Navigator/ Solution Scenario/ ma...
entry.content: Hello, From my understanding, there is no mandatory one. If the business needs it, you can implement. If not, then you don't need to implement. So maybe you can explain what is the purpose of this question. Best Regards, Owen

entry.title: Re: CPQ License - How to extend the limit of active users
entry.content:
Hi,

Please contact your company's SAP sales account executive to subscribe for additional user licenses.
In the meantime, you may also request your CPQ administrators to review existing user accounts and deactivate any that are no longer in use to free up some quotas.

Best Regards,
Fancy

entry.title: Re: Converted our system SAP to SAP S4HANA we are facing issue to print any SMARTFORM.
entry.content: Hi dear, I have the same problem, could you solve this issue?

entry.title: Not able to find certification exam for C_THR81_2405

Not able to find certification exam for C_THR81_2405 under learning.sap.com>get certifications

Also, selecting any certification by clicking on 'Schedule Exam' is redirecting me "Buy Learning Hub" which I did not used to see earlier.

entry.title: Re: Actual Rate Calculation - Event Based Posting
entry.content: Hi Owen, for point 1) please let me know which settings are you reffering and as regards point 2 all necessary settings are aligned like creation of cost element group and activity type group as are mapped in splitting structure. Will appreciate your quick response

entry.title: Re: An authorization token of destination ads-rest-api ha...
entry.content: Yes, you are right. We cannot cache the destination on application level.

entry.title: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi David @David_Chaviano 

Thank you David to guide Newcomers through the Digital Skills initiative.

I am excited to be part of this initiative and eager to enhance my expertise by pursuing an SAP certification. Below is a brief summary of my background:

  • Educational Background: I am currently a third-year student majoring in E-commerce. My curriculum includes foundational courses related to SAP, such as Business Information Systems, Business Process Integration with ERP Systems 1, Financial Accounting, and Supply Chain Management in E-commerce. These subjects have provided me with a solid base in both business processes and SAP applications, making me eager to deepen my expertise through this initiative.
  • Why I am a good fit for the program: Through my studies, I’ve developed a strong enthusiasm for SAP’s transformative role in optimizing business processes. I aspire to become an SAP solutions consultant, using SAP tools to help businesses streamline operations and enhance decision-making. This program aligns perfectly with my career goals, offering the foundation I need to build expertise and make a meaningful impact in the field.

I have chosen the Explore Integrated Business Processes in SAP S/4HANA learning journey, and the photo below is an evidence of my completion.

Thank you very much for taking the time to review my request. I look forward to receiving a registration link from you.

entry.title: Re: Incorrect download link for 32 bit Crystal for visual studio
entry.content: Yes. I will definitely use that link in the future, but links have a tendency to go stale. So it is good if even a search produces the correct results and in this case the link "SAP Crystal Reports for Visual Studio (SP36) 32b installation package for Microsoft Visual Studio IDE (VS 2019 and below)" does download 64 bit and not 32, ie CRforVS6413SP36_0-80007712.EXE

entry.title: Making Script Objects as global
entry.content:
Hello all.
I have doubt, we use Script objects to create functions that can be reused in the stories. Is there a way to make those script objects like they can be used in all the reports like a global or inbuilt function. This reduces code redundancy and make its easy to write scripts. Your thoughts and ideas will be of great help.
Thank you.

entry.title: Import Sales Orders (Part 10): Location of Item-Level Issues Using Application Log
entry.content:
As of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502, item number information is available in the application log of the Import Sales Orders and Import Sales Orders Without Charge apps. 

When an import contains errors (indicating sales document creation has failed or partially failed), you can check the application log of failed import items to identify possible causes. The “Item in File” field in the application log allows you quickly locate document items with issues and correct them in your file. After the data correction, you can perform a corrective import. 

Here’s a focus on the "Import Sales Orders":

You must adapt view settings to make this field visible on the UI. 

The "Item in File" field corresponds to the item ID (ITEM.SALESORDERITEM or ITEM.SLSDOCITEMEXTERNALASSIGNMENTID) specified in your file. It becomes particularly useful when an error arises at the item level during sales document creation. With the item number information, you can easily trace and correct the items with issues in your file. 

For convenience, you can save the customized view as a variant. This enables the "Item in File" column to be pre-selected in future. 

Useful links:

Blog Series for Import Sales Orders

entry.title: Re: Transport of Flexible workflow containing "Teams"
entry.content: As this is more relevant with Marketing Cloud, please remove tags SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Best regards,

 

Ruud

hi, in our system there's no datasource "Dataset" avaiable.

for it, is there a system configuration neccesary?

entry.title: Hide Payment End date for some pay component and for some company code
entry.content:
Hi All,

We want to hide "payment end date (Define end date)" for some pay component and some company code in compensation portlet. There are 3 pay components with "End-Dated Payments" = Yes, and many countries use them.
We want to hide the "payment end date " field for the only two company codes.
We tried to create a rule, but it doesn't work properly. 

So, could you please suggest is it possible to hide "payment end date" for some company code and some pay components using business rule or any other solutions? PFA screenshot for reference

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Change a dataset in a SAC story and to keep the story...
entry.content: did you click the link from bottom in the first popup to create a classic model?

entry.title: Re: Frun Monitoring decommission
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

It needs to check whether these database systems have linking associations. You can check this via LMDB->Display the DB system->Details->Associations. If all the database systems are independent, removing the systems marked in red will not cause any harm to the others. It is recommended to reach out to SAP FRUN support to log into the system and confirm, in order to provide a definitive answer.

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: userexit/badi/BTE for FB60 to change exchange rate
entry.content:
Hi All,

I need the user exit/Badi/BTE for FB60 for the below scenario.

I am creating the Incoming Invoices from FB60. Presently the Exchanges rate(0b08) are calculating based on Posting date but I need this to be calculated based on Invoice date. 

Thanks

entry.title: can you add custom field(available on MIRO) in FS10N layout?
entry.content:
can you add custom field(available on MIRO) in FS10N layout?

We tried through BTE 1650,1120 but its not getting called during FS10n.

We cant add a RBKP field in O7R3 as well.

Anyone handled similar requirement?

entry.title: Re: How to assign Users as Approver and Requester in SAP...
entry.content: Why did you do all this? Are you working with others on this project? Did someone tell you that you need a landscape like this?

entry.title: Re: How to assign Users as Approver and Requester in SAP...
entry.content: Unless you have a specific landscape in mind, you do the following: (1) 1 global account and 1 subaccount; (2) Create users in your custom IDP and make sure they are listed as users in your subaccount (and make sure your IDP is trusted by your subaccount); (3) Use Process Automation. You will have one component that is Inbox but everyone will open it and see their items.

entry.title: Re: Possible options for API Monitoring via SAP Cloud ALM?
entry.content:
From SAP Cloud ALM point of view, only the "Certificates" metric is available in the health monitoring for the SAP Integration Suite (API Management). 

Please raise your request to the influence page of SAP Cloud ALM for Operations.

entry.title: Learning Registration Notification: amount of listed classes limited?
entry.content:
Hello,

we are facing the issue that the registration notification that is sent to the user only lists 6 classes in the text although 7 calendar attachments are added.

The training indeed consists of 7 classes so the attachments are correct.
We use the default vcal code.

Does anybody know why only 6 classes are displayed in the message text? Is there a limitation?

Thanks in advance.

Kind regards

Annett

SAP SuccessFactors Learning

entry.title: Re: Simple diagnostic installation error - Connect to <ho...
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

Please try the solution steps in 3299160 SDA deployment failed with CX_SRSM_DEPLOY_SMD_AGENT : HTTP failure. Making sure, it works to ping from FRUN server to the mentioned SAP Host Agent server and port 1129.

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: SAP CPQ 2411 版本亮点新功能摘要
entry.content:
CPQ - BRIM 分层定价

从 2411 开始，当在 SAP CPQ 中启用 BRIM 集成后，用户可在 CPQ 中报价单行项目级别查看（于SAP S/4HANA 中维护的）默认阶梯价格，并根据需要进行调整。重新定义的层级还可被发送进行审批，在生成的凭证中亦可打印阶梯价格信息。

有关此全新功能的详细说明请参阅 Tiered Pricing in SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management Integration。

在报价单中直接向主行项目添加子项目功能

全新的添加子项目操作将允许用户直接从目录向报价中的根项目或行项目添加子项目。通过此功能，在没有预先复杂的产品建模的情况下，销售代表即便捷地在报价单中直接构建复杂的产品层级结构。

有关此全新功能的详细说明请参阅 Adding Products to Quote。

Involved Parties 页签的 Responsive Templates

SAP CPQ 管理员即日起可以在 Involved Parties 页签上定制 Business Partner UI 模型。

优化的行项目搜索功能

改进后的搜索结果将显示每个行项目到其根项目的完整路径，帮助用户直观地理解产品层次结构。

代码调试模式的性能改进

此为一项重要更新。为提高性能，开发者用户可以通过 TraceFormat 和 TraceStepFormat 实现利用消息的延迟格式设置，而不是格式化脚本中的字符串。此功能生效需同时满足以下前提条件：

  • 调试模式下 Trace 已开启；
  • 在消息到达追踪对象之前写入消息，而不是格式化消息时

以下为代码示例。

 

Trace.WriteFormat('This {0} is {1}.', 'message','formatted')
Trace.WriteStepFormat('This {0} is {1}.', 'message',' formatted'):
 Trace.Write('Inside message')

 

该功能改进起到的效果会比您想象中更大。如果您曾经尝试过仅使用 .Format 方式，可能会留意到即使Developer Console 中 Trace 未打开时，增强脚本执行的时间相比没有 Trace 语句仍会显著地增加。

请阅读 Performance Troubleshooting 以了解更多关于性能调优的开发指导。

Quote 2.0 的行项目重新排序功能

SAP CPQ 的 Quote 2.0 改善了行项目重排序功能，其允许用户更轻松、更准确地重新排序项目，从而节省时间并最大限度地减少错误。

用于管理报价文档的 API

从 2411 开始，CPQ 将支持外部系统的文件通过接口集成传入，包括但不限于以下应用场景：

  • 从其他系统上载文档；
  • 存储由第三方系统生成的文件（例如 CAD toold）；
  • 支持从 Quote 1.0 迁移到 Quote 2.0 。

API 详情请参阅：

  • /api/v1/quotes/{quoteId}/attachments 
  • /api/v1/quotes/{quoteId}/attachments/{attachmentId} 

深色和浅色对比度主题

从 2411 版本开始，SAP CPQ 将为用户界面引入专为 Quote 2.0 设计新的深色和浅色对比度主题。

请注意，已部署定制 UI 模板的用户在使用界面新主题时可能会遇到问题，因为定制模板的 HTML 代码与针对最新模板版本的 HTML 设计的 CSS 选择器不同。

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM Document Integration with SharePoint
entry.content: The integration of the external document management systems is planned as in the following roadmap. https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=73554900100800002513&q=sharepoint&range=CURRENT-LAST#;INNO=E78B0E4728D31EEDA3A150651045C059 Please raise support ticket for the component SV-CLM-IMP-DOC for further information.

For code explanation we probably don't need more than we have in current LLMs. They are great in this task.

entry.title: Re: How can i close production order after techo ?
entry.content:
Greetings,

the error message you are referring to might just be a warning. You can close the production order by following the menu seen below. order assumes status CLSD.

Best regards, M.

entry.title: Re: Set New Internal Order User Status for Existing Orders
entry.content:
New User Status can be add to old or existing Internal order by adding the newly created status profile variant in status profile.

Click on Goto from menu bar

select - Status

check for Status Profile - mention the newly created status profile in it

entry.title: Re: Ui5 init command not working
entry.content: Thanks for the reply,

entry.title: Re: Ui5 init command not working
entry.content: When i Run the command @ui5/cli then it showing bash: @ui5/cli: No such file or directory

entry.title: Bom Explosion report Issue
entry.content:
The issue is related to finished Good BoM explosion report. We are using the function module CS_BOM_EXPL_MAT_V2  to get quantites and do some calculation

The CALL FUNCTION 'CS_BOM_EXPL_MAT_V2' is always giving the output with first bom. My requirement is to get the output based on latest alternative bom (latest stlal)

( if it is single get it single one , if there are two or more the get it latest last one)

 But the function module is giving the output with first one always.

Is the any FM exists that will pick the latest alternative BOM to get the output.

Example :

It is always picking alternative BOM 1.

And the scenario is that some component like 23216 is occurring in more than one compounds.

My problem is not resolved.

In second case if using select query using MAST, STKO, STOP, STAS then system is getting the alternative BOM but not able to pick the how many times the components 23216 ( may be more materials ) is occurring in one finished material. Any solution for this,,,,,,

Thanks,

Vashi

entry.title: Re: How can i close production order after techo ?
entry.content: when i click on close give msg " The business transac cannot be carried out "

entry.title: Re: Please, I need to convert these loops to the new version 7.5 syntax
entry.content: If t_grupo2 consists of lines with a large data set, you should use ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL or INTO REFERENCE. Actually using field-symbols or references is never wrong. INTO DATA copies the whole table line, which consumes time and memory.

entry.title: Re: How can i close production order after techo ?
entry.content:
Greetings,

can you share a screen shot of the error and also detail information of the error?

Best regards, M.

entry.title: Re: How can i close production order after techo ?
entry.content: share your email id ..

entry.title: Re: How can i close production order after techo ?
entry.content: yes i got this msg The business transac cannot be carried out "

entry.title: Actions on table fields in object page of SAP Fiori list report app
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have created a Fiori List Report application using a template with CAPM CDS. On the object page I have a table along with header section. I want to manipulate the fields in the table upon selection of first field of the table and also enable/disable few fields.

 

As it is template generated code, I am not able to find out a place to write the code for same.

Is there any option to achieve the same in controller/cds/anywhere else.

Awaiting positive responses from all the experts.

 

Regards,

Chaitali

entry.title: Finite Scheduling not working during production order.
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I want to activate finite scheduling at production order level but system is not suggesting new start date and finish date. System is also not picking shift when finite scheduling. I have maintained all necessary configuration and work center master data. Also attaching screenshot for points:

Also attaching error screen shot, Please suggest how to rectify this issue.


1) Tick mark for finite scheduling in work center

 

2) Shift and shift sequence maintained in work center

 

3) Formula maintained

 

4)Order control - availability check (01 & 02)

 

5) Scheduling Parameter

 

4) Production scheduling profile

Regards,

Tejas P.

entry.title: Re: Applications, Single and Composite roles are not disp...
entry.content:
Hi Plaban,

 

Please activate the 'authorization policy' 'Policy Set Access Auth ALL' if its inactive. Or check if there is any other custom policy for access request activated and does not allow user to select all access.

Thanks,

Swapnil B

entry.title: Update Last Change Date on table MSTA when updating custom fields on MARC
entry.content:
HI, I have extended custom fields in MARC table, following all the steps from the SAP Note. Everything is working fine, the field is updated succesfully from tcode MM02. But the thing is whenever I am updating values of the custom fields, the last changed data in MSTA is not updating. Is there any way that we can trigger MSTA to update the material last changed date when custom fields are updated ? Or any way that we can capture changes of those newly created custom fields in MARC ?

Any help is appreciated. Thanks.
